display.purpose: Hero headline only; second line takes Cobre. Web track — print art uses Anton instead.

headline.purpose: Section headings, store CTA headings, card art text.

body.purpose: The only font allowed to speak in sentences; shared by web and print tracks.

label.purpose: Typewriter metadata voice: nav links, eyebrows (0.28em), tags, footer meta. Uppercase, never below 10px.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Product card hover only, paired with translateY(-3px). Never at rest.

shadows.name: copper-glow
shadows.purpose: Hero press-die mark only — lamplight on metal, not UI elevation.

motion.name: press-in
motion.purpose: Stamp-landing entrance for the hero mark: scale 1.1→1 with blur settling.

motion.name: pulse
motion.purpose: Live copper dot on store links/badges. Must pause under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Default transition for hovers: border-color, color, transform, box-shadow.

components.name: CTA Button (nav)
components.description: Outlined copper typewriter button that inverts to solid copper on hover — the press coming down.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { background: transparent; color: #C0492C; border: 1px solid rgba(192,73,44,0.4); border-radius: 0; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.22s ease, border-color 0.22s ease, background 0.22s ease; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: #C0492C; color: #10100E; border-color: #C0492C; } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C0492C; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Store Link (large)
components.description: Large Bebas outlined link with a pulsing copper live-dot; border and text turn copper on hover.
components.css: .ds-store-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-family: 'Bebas Neue', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-size: 22px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #F3EADB; text-decoration: none; padding: 16px 32px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(243,234,219,0.14); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 0.22s ease, color 0.22s ease; } .ds-store-link:hover { border-color: #C0492C; color: #C0492C; } .ds-store-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C0492C; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-store-link-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(192,73,44,0.6); animation: ds-pulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.6; } 50% { transform: scale(1.35); opacity: 1; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-store-link-dot { animation: none; opacity: 0.8; } }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Hueso paper card, sharp corners: typewriter header with tag, huge Bebas art text with copper second line, hairline foot. Lifts on hover.
components.html:
Playera · DTGEvergreen
Orgullo
Mexicano
Sello clásico v1
components.css: .ds-card { background: #F3EADB; color: #10100E; border-radius: 0; padding: 28px 26px 22px; max-width: 300px; transition: transform 0.22s ease, box-shadow 0.22s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-card:hover { transform: none; } } .ds-card-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 18px; } .ds-card-type { font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(27,23,20,0.62); } .ds-card-art { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-size: 44px; line-height: 0.86; text-transform: uppercase; min-height: 88px; } .ds-card-art2 { color: #C0492C; } .ds-card-foot { border-top: 1px solid rgba(27,23,20,0.08); padding-top: 12px; margin-top: 16px; } .ds-card-name { font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(27,23,20,0.62); } .ds-tag-ev { font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(47,93,80,0.12); color: #2F5D50; }

components.name: Evergreen Chip
components.description: Tiny typewriter chip on a 12% Nopal tint — the system's only rounded corners (2px).
components.css: .ds-chip-ev { font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(47,93,80,0.12); color: #2F5D50; }

components.name: Seasonal Chip
components.description: Seasonal variant: Ámbar Oscuro text on a 12% Ámbar tint — raw Ámbar is never used as text.
components.css: .ds-chip-seas { font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(226,165,60,0.12); color: #9A6A10; }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: The system's one licensed kicker: copper typewriter label beside a short copper rule, then the Bebas headline.
components.html:
La colección

Lo nuestro,
bien hecho
components.css: .ds-section-head { background: #10100E; padding: 24px; } .ds-section-pre { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 14px; } .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C0492C; } .ds-section-rule { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: rgba(192,73,44,0.18); max-width: 120px; } .ds-section-h2 { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(36px, 6vw, 68px); line-height: 0.88; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #F3EADB; margin: 0; }

components.name: Nav Bar
components.description: Fixed 58px translucent dark bar with blur and copper hairline; Bebas wordmark left, typewriter links right.
components.html: Sello BravoLa colecciónLa marcaTienda
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 58px; padding: 0 24px; background: rgba(10,10,9,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(192,73,44,0.18); } .ds-nav-name { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #F3EADB; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(243,234,219,0.58); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.22s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #F3EADB; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible, .ds-nav-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C0492C; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-nav-cta { font-family: 'Special Elite', Courier, monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C0492C; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid rgba(192,73,44,0.4); padding: 6px 14px; transition: color 0.22s ease, border-color 0.22s ease, background 0.22s ease; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #C0492C; color: #10100E; border-color: #C0492C; }

narrative.overview:
A letterpress workshop after dark. Copper ink under a work lamp, bone paper on the bench, ledger lines ruled across the ground, film grain in the air. Every surface behaves like a print artifact: the seal comes down, the ink bites, the edge stays sharp. The shipping site is the workshop at night — near-black ground (#10100E), copper (#C0492C) doing all the talking, bone (#F3EADB) as both paper and voice.

This is a two-track system, by explicit decision. Track one is the web system: Bebas Neue display + Special Elite labels + Bitter body on the dark ground — what ships at sellobravo.com. Track two is the print system for product art: Anton display + Oswald labels, Tinta ink #1B1714 on Hueso/white. The two tracks share the palette, the seal devices, and the voice; they never swap typefaces.
keyCharacteristics: Dark letterpress ground; copper is the single loud voice (Committed strategy)
Everything sharp-cornered; the only radii are 2px chips and round dots
Material depth (grain, paper noise, copper hairlines), not shadow depth
Typewriter metadata voice (Special Elite) against condensed display shouting (Bebas Neue)
The press-die lockup and 8-leaf maguey star recur as nav icon, watermark, and footer mark
Two tracks, one brand: web (Bebas/Special Elite) and print (Anton/Oswald), never mixed

rules.name: The Two Inks Rule
rules.body: Tinta #1B1714 is print ink; Tinta Profunda #10100E is the web ground. They are different tokens with different jobs. Never swap them, never invent a third near-black (#12100E is dead; --bone and --mid are dead tokens — delete on sight).

rules.name: The Copper Hairline Rule
rules.body: Structure on the dark ground is drawn with 1px copper transparencies (rgba(192,73,44, 0.10–0.18)), not gray borders, not box shadows.

rules.name: The Legible Alpha Rule
rules.body: On #10100E, Hueso alphas below 0.55 fail AA for body-size text (0.42 computes to ~3.6:1, 0.2 to ~1.7:1). Text that must be read uses α ≥ 0.58; alphas 0.14–0.45 are reserved for decorative/duplicated content only. Ink-on-paper text uses rgba(27,23,20, α) with α ≥ 0.62.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue shouts on the web; Anton shouts on garments. Special Elite labels the web; Oswald labels the seal and print art. Bitter is the only shared voice. Mixing tracks on one surface is forbidden.

rules.name: The Outlined Type Rule
rules.body: No live <text> in distributed SVG. Every logo or design SVG that leaves the repo has its type converted to paths (web marks from Bebas Neue, print art from Anton). Impact appearing in a rendered asset means this rule was broken.

rules.name: The Thumbnail Rule
rules.body: Every composition must survive shrinking to a marketplace thumbnail: one dominant element, line-heights tight, hierarchy readable at 120px wide.

rules.name: The Ink, Not Air Rule
rules.body: If a surface needs to feel distinct at rest, give it texture, a hairline, or a different ground color — never a resting shadow.

dos: Do carry all structure on the dark ground with copper hairlines (rgba(192,73,44, 0.10–0.18)) and material texture — grain, paper noise, ledger lines.
Do keep text-bearing Hueso alphas ≥ 0.58 on #10100E (The Legible Alpha Rule) and use Ámbar Oscuro #9A6A10 for any amber text.

Do ship a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce alternative for every animation (pulse dots, press-in entrances, drawer slides, smooth scroll) — and a designed :focus-visible state on every interactive element. The existing pages owe this debt; new work never adds to it.
Do outline all SVG type to paths before an asset leaves the repo (web marks in Bebas Neue, print art in Anton).
Do keep the two tracks pure: Bebas Neue + Special Elite on web surfaces; Anton + Oswald on product art; Bitter for prose everywhere.
Do write copy Spanish-first, short and witty, and alt text in brand voice, in Spanish.
donts: Don't reach for touristy-kitsch or the flag-cliché — no sombreros, no serape gradients, no green-white-red palette shortcuts, no "auténtico mexicano™" tropes.
Don't drift into sad-beige minimalism: warmth comes from copper, paper texture, and voice — never from a cream body background or gray-on-gray restraint.

Don't use generic AI landing-page grammar: uniform icon-card grids, a tracked uppercase eyebrow above every section (the section-header device is the one licensed kicker), gradient text, hero-metric blocks, or side-stripe borders.
Don't invent near-blacks or resurrect dead tokens: #12100E, --bone, --mid, and #B07D20 are retired; the only darks are Tinta #1B1714 (print), Tinta Profunda #10100E (web), and Fondo Hondo #0A0A09.
Don't round corners beyond the 2px chip radius, add resting shadows, or gradiate/shadow the Cobre marks (the seal is one-color by design).
Don't ship a web surface in Anton/Oswald or product art in Bebas Neue/Special Elite — if the store page goes live, it is retrofitted to the web track first.
Don't put live <text> in distributed SVGs — Impact leaking into rendered assets is the tell that type wasn't outlined.
